hero.subtitle: Discover our new intelligent knowledge center. Generate tailored study sessions with AI, play engaging mini-games, and track your precise knowledge development via our dynamic Live Radar. All powered by Google Gemini.
hero.tech_tagline: Powered by Modern AI & Proven Pedagogy

features.title: Everything You Need to Run a Modern School
features.subtitle: From robust assessment tools to revolutionary AI support - we've got you covered.

multi_tenancy.title: True Multi-Tenancy
multi_tenancy.desc: Complete data isolation with schema-per-tenant architecture. Each school has its own protected database.

b2b.title: B2B SaaS Engine
b2b.desc: Manage multiple organizations and sub-accounts with dedicated billing support and admin overview.

microservice.title: Distributed Microservices
microservice.desc: Scalable architecture with Node.js, Spring Boot & Python running in isolated Docker containers.

event_bus.title: Real-time Event Bus
event_bus.desc: Instant data synchronization with RabbitMQ for real-time notifications and system events.

gamification.title: Advanced Gamification
gamification.desc: Engage students with XP, Streaks, Achievements, and our unique AI-powered Live Radar.

ai_creator.title: AI Content Lifecycle
ai_creator.desc: From quiz generation to automated grading and personalized study tips via Gemini.

pwa.title: Cross-Platform PWA
pwa.desc: EduFlex works just as well in the browser as an installed app on iOS, Android, and Windows.

live_video.title: Native Live Lessons
live_video.desc: Built-in tools for video seminars and recorded material directly in the course environment.

collaborative.title: Live Collaborative Learning
collaborative.desc: Learn together with built-in support for OnlyOffice and shared workspaces in real time.

roi.title: ROI & Analytics Engine
roi.desc: Visualize training effectiveness with in-depth statistics for both principals and teachers.

notifications.title: Event-Driven Notifications
notifications.desc: Important events are never missed thanks to our advanced notification system for all devices.

exams.title: Digital Exams & Proctoring
exams.desc: Secure and legally sound digital examinations with built-in support for identity verification.

integrations.title: Enterprise Integrations
integrations.desc: Connect seamlessly to existing systems via LTI 1.3, BankID, and modern REST APIs.

compliance.title: Zero-Trust Compliance
compliance.desc: GDPR-secured data storage with end-to-end encryption and automated pseudonymization.

pii.title: PII Masking Pipeline
pii.desc: Our unique AI pipeline cleanses all personal data before it reaches external language models.

educareer.title: EduCareer Roadmap
educareer.desc: Help students visualize their future through adaptive career paths linked to the job market.

erp.title: ERP+ Integration
erp.desc: Manage purchasing, billing, and personnel in the same interface as teaching takes place.

isp.title: Dynamic ISP & LIA
isp.desc: Manage individual study plans and internships (LIA) with automated matching.

bankid.title: BankID & FrejaeID
bankid.desc: Secure authentication according to Swedish standard for staff, students, and guardians.

video_tutor.title: Interactive AI Video Tutor
video_tutor.desc: Interact directly with video content through AI-driven search and follow-up questions.

language_sync.title: Global Language Sync
language_sync.desc: The entire system can be translated into any language in seconds via our AI translation hub.

susa.title: SUSA & Ladok Ready
susa.desc: Full support for Swedish reporting standards to authorities and study administrative systems.

ladok.title: Cloud-Native Infrastructure
ladok.desc: Serverless scalability with Kubernetes and MinIO for high availability and performance.

accessibility.title: WCAG 2.1 Accessibility
accessibility.desc: Designed for inclusion. Full accessibility for all users regardless of conditions.

skolfederation.title: Skolfederation & SSO
skolfederation.desc: Simplified login via common standards for Swedish schools and authorities.

roi.title: ROI Analytics Hub
roi.desc: Track training impact and return on investment in real time with in-depth statistics.

settings.title: Global System Control
settings.desc: Full control over all instances, users, and network configurations.

debug.title: Developer Terminal
debug.desc: Built-in debug tools and system logs for technical administrators.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard 2.0
admin.desc: Total control over the organization with live data and widgets.

teacher.title: Teacher Panel
teacher.desc: Efficient overview of student attendance, progress, and submissions.

quiz.title: AI Quiz Generator
quiz.desc: Upload documents and let AI create quiz questions in seconds.

library.title: E-book Library
library.desc: A central library for literature with built-in reader.

catalog.title: Course Catalog
catalog.desc: Explore our wide range of courses directly from the landing page.

resource.title: Resource Bank
resource.desc: Find useful tools and documents for your studies.

analytics.title: In-Depth Analysis
analytics.desc: Visualize progress and results with our powerful analysis tools.

updates.title: What's New & What's Next?
updates.subtitle: Follow our journey towards v4.0 and see the latest improvements in the platform.
updates.changelog_desc: Stay updated with every fix, optimization, and new feature we roll out.
updates.roadmap_desc: See our vision for 2026 and the exciting modules we are developing right now.

changelog_items.title: AI Accessibility Engine
changelog_items.desc: Automated EN 301 549 (DOS-lagen) compliance scanner integrated into the editor.

changelog_items.title: Turbo-Load
changelog_items.desc: Initial load time reduced by 80% via code-splitting and dynamic i18n.

changelog_items.title: AI Robustness
changelog_items.desc: Gemini Fallback system for 100% AI service uptime.

roadmap_items.title: Accessibility (AI)
roadmap_items.desc: Fully operational compliance engine integrated in RichTextEditor.

roadmap_items.title: JobEd Connect
roadmap_items.desc: Matching educational goals to professional competencies.

roadmap_items.title: Integration Hub
roadmap_items.desc: Automated sync for Skolverket, Ladok, and HR systems.

roadmap_items.title: AF MCP AI
roadmap_items.desc: Advanced taxonomy analysis using Af development tools.

roles.title: One Platform, Endless Possibilities
roles.subtitle: EduFlex is designed to support every role in the educational journey, from administrative control to engaged learning.

rector.title: For Principals & Management
rector.desc: Gain total control over the organization's growth, profitability, and educational quality.

teacher.title: For Teachers & Educators
teacher.desc: Automate administrative work and spend more time on what actually matters: pedagogy.
teacher.outcome: Reduced stress and higher student engagement.

student.title: For Students & Pupils
student.desc: A modern and gamified experience that makes learning fun, understandable, and accessible.
student.outcome: Higher focus and faster goal achievement.

parent.title: For Guardians
parent.desc: Follow your child's development in real-time and communicate easily with the school.
parent.outcome: Security and full insight into schooling.

cta.title: Are you ready to transform your educational operations?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of other organizations and step into the future of digital learning today.

footer.tagline: The Future of LLP and the Ecosystem for Digital Learning. Designed with heart, driven by AI.
